Q.entity_description: Q represents the query input in the multi-head attention mechanism, which is used to retrieve relevant information from the input data.

K.entity_description: K stands for the key input in the multi-head attention mechanism, which is used in conjunction with the query to determine the relevance of different parts of the input data.

y<i.entity_description: y<i refers to the previous outputs in a sequence, which are used as part of the input for predicting the next output y_i. This notation indicates that the model takes into account the history of outputs to make predictions.

Pctc.entity_description: Pctc is a specific probability function that calculates the conditional probability of y_i given the input X and the previous outputs y<i. It is a component of the overall probability distribution P.

Prnn.entity_description: Prnn is a recurrent neural network-based probability function that also contributes to the overall probability distribution P. It utilizes the sequential nature of the data to make predictions.

\u03b21.entity_description: β1 is a tuning parameter used in the model to weight the contribution of the Ps2s function to the overall probability distribution P. It is adjusted based on performance on a development set.
